title: High sensitivity (low input) miRNA Illumina library preparation protocol by TailorMix miRNA Sample Preparation Kit
author: Karen Yip
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.e6abhae

steps.title: Thaw Mix C300
steps.instruction: Thaw Mix C300 from -20°C storage. Allow it to equilibrate to room temperature for a minimum of 30 minutes before use.

steps.title: Pre-heat thermal cyclers
steps.instruction: Pre-heat the thermal cycler to 70°C and pre-heat another thermal cycler to 25°C if available.

steps.title: Denature RNA sample
steps.instruction: Denature the RNA Sample by assembling the following components in a sterile 200 μL PCR tube on ice.

steps.title: Vortex and incubate
steps.instruction: Vortex mix thoroughly and incubate at 70°C for 1 minute and then place the tube on ice.

steps.title: Set up 3' Adapter Ligation
steps.instruction: Set up the following 3’ Adapter Ligation reaction on ice. Note: Mix C300 is a highly viscous reagent. Handle with care and pipette slowly to ensure the correct amount of Mix C300 is dispensed for each reaction.

steps.title: Vortex, spin and incubate
steps.instruction: Vortex mix thoroughly and pulse spin. Incubate at 25°C for 1 hour.

steps.title: Vortex TailorMag Beads
steps.instruction: Vortex the TailorMag Purification Beads (TPB) until they are evenly suspended.

steps.title: Add TPB and incubate
steps.instruction: Add 30 μL of TPB with each 3’-adapter ligated sample from Step 6. Vortex mix thoroughly and pulse spin. Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes. Note: Do NOT perform strong centrifugation because it will separate TPB from the sample.

steps.title: Place on magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Place the sample tube on the magnetic stand at room temperature for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Carefully remove and discard 40 μL of the supernatant. Note: Sample recovery may be affected if the TPB pellet is disrupted.

steps.title: Rinse TPB pellet
steps.instruction: Keep sample tube on the magnetic stand. Gently rinse the TPB pellet with 150 μL of 80% ethanol without disrupting the TPB pellet. Discard the rinse solution. Tip: Point pipette tip towards opposite direction as the TPB pellet. Gently pipette the 80% ethanol up and down once, then discard the rinse solution.

steps.title: Air dry TPB pellet
steps.instruction: Air dry sample tube at room temperature. Note: TailorMag Purification Beads are dried within 5 to 15 minutes at room temperature. Proceed to Step 14 when the appearance of the TPB pellet turns from glossy/shiny (wet) to matte (dry). Sample recovery may be affected if beads are over-dried and appear powdery.

steps.title: Remove from magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove sample tube from the magnetic stand.

steps.title: Add nuclease free water
steps.instruction: Add 7 μL of nuclease free water to the dried TPB pellet.

steps.title: Vortex and spin
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend and pulse spin.

steps.title: Incubate sample resuspension
steps.instruction: Incubate sample resuspension at room temperature for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Set up 5' Adapter Ligation
steps.instruction: Set up the following 5’ Adapter Ligation reaction on ice.

steps.title: Mix and incubate
steps.instruction: Gently pipette mix thoroughly and incubate at 25°C for 1 hour and then place the tube on ice.
